/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/vel_forwarder/libvel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vel_forwarder/msg/_vel_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vel_forwarder/msg/_buff_data_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vel_forwarder/msg/_game_data_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vel_forwarder/msg/_gimbal_angles_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vel_forwarder/msg/_health_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vel_forwarder/msg/_position_data_s.c.o CMakeFiles/vel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vel_forwarder/msg/_uwb_pos_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/peony/navigation_ws/build/vel_forwarder:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libvel_forwarder__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so libvel_forwarder__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
